message:
fix(orphans): early return in Quiet mode to skip dead rendering code

The Quiet variant of OrphanRenderMode fell through to subsequent
rendering logic (panel construction, etc.) instead of returning early.
While the match arm was empty and no visible output was produced, the
code after the match block could still execute unnecessarily. Changed
the Quiet arm from a no-op `{}` to `return Ok(())` so it exits
immediately, matching the intent of quiet mode and preventing any
accidental side-effects from downstream code.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
